title: ProDec Advance 100 sqm (4m x 25m) Super Cling Polythene Dust Sheet Roll Static Charged For Invisible Cling with No Taping, Ideal for Protecting Floors, Furniture & Walls When Painting & Decorating
features: Static charged polythene dust sheet roll that clings horizontally and vertically to almost any surface
Quick and simple application with no need for taping - reposition effortlessly again and again
Protects surfaces from paint splashes and also attracts overspray and sanding dust
Safety cutter included to trim to size and minimise wastage
4m x 25m roll gives 100 sqm coverage and comes in a handy dispenser box - also available in 200m2 coverage
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Super Cling is a polythene dust sheet roll that has been statically charged to enable it to cling to virtually any surface without the need for taping, including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Application is quick and simple: press to the surface and let the static charge do the rest - it can be repositioned effortlessly again and again as required. Not only does it protect surfaces like normal polythene dust sheets, but the static charge also attracts overspray if you're painting using spray equipment and sanding dust to reduce both mess and airborne particles while you’re working Super Cling comes in a compact dispenser box and, unlike standard polythene sheets, you're not stuck with a fixed sheet size: a handy safety cutter provided enables you to cut the sheet to the required size for the job at hand, which also minimises waste. Super Cling - Fast, Efficient, Clean No tape required Super Cling's static charge means that it can be applied quickly and easily with no tape or other fixing required - just press it into place and let the static do the rest. Clings to virtually all surfaces Super Cling will stay in place on virtually any surface including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Reposition again and again Positioning Super Cling in place is easy: just slide into place along the surface and it stays where you put it. If you need to move it, simply slide it across and around - no hassle, no mess. Dispenser box with safety cutter Super Cling comes on a roll in a dispenser box that enables you to easily cut it to size to fit the area being covered and minimise waste. A handy safety cutter is included and it cuts equally well with sharp scissors or a knife. Temporary protection solutions from ProDec ProDec has a range of products for protecting floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust, dirt and more during decorating and general maintenance work. Polythene dust sheets Made from waterproof recyclable LDPE material and available in both sheets and rolls, polythene is lightweight and cost-effective. Super Cling Super Cling is waterproof recyclable LDPE material that has been statically charged to enable it to cling to virtually any surface without the need for taping, including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Self-adhesive films Made from puncture resistant polythene that enables it to withstand heavy traffic, ProDec’s self-adhesive film protects against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more. It applies easily without the need for any special application tools and stays in place once down. Available in Carpet, Hard Floor and Glass grades. Cotton dust sheets Classic cotton twill fabric that soaks up small splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. Available in a range of sizes in both standard and Protector waterproof plastic backed versions.
